(1) This Order maybe called the Tea (Marketing) Control (Amendment) Order, 2005. Note: The Principal notification waspublished vide S.O. 1(E), dated 1-1-2003 in the Gazette of India (Extraordinary) and subsequently amended vide S.O. 247(E), dated the 28thFebruary, 2003, S.O. 430(E), dated 10th April, 2003, S.O. 270(E), dated 27th February, 2004 and S.O. 1170(E), dated20thOctober, 2004.
